select_vehicle.pricing_info: All prices include VAT, taxes & tolls

passenger_details.pricing_info: All prices include VAT, taxes & tolls

step3.airport_pickup_description: Your driver will track your flight and adjust the pickup time accordingly.
step3.luggage_capacity_notice: This car supports a maximum of {count} suitcase(s). Please select luggage within this limit. If you need additional luggage capacity, please choose a different car that supports more suitcases.
step3.meet_greet_placeholder: Meet & Greet Instructions (e.g. Name board text, arrival meeting point)
step3.child_seats_toggle_label: Need a child or booster seat?
step3.payment_method_title: How would you like to pay?
step3.payment_method_notice: The processing fee applies only to credit and debit card payments. JazzCash and similar bank payments are not charged this fee.
step3.card_processing_fee_notice: A {percent}% processing fee is included in your total amount.
step3.card_processing_fee_accept: I understand that a {percent}% processing fee applies to my booking
step3.card_processing_fee_required: Please acknowledge the processing fee to continue

waiting_time.title: Extra Waiting Time
waiting_time.description: Select how much extra time you want the driver to wait for you.

payment_success.confirmation_message: Your ride {for_someone} has been confirmed and is ready for your journey. A confirmation email has been sent to {email} with full trip details.
payment_success.payment_verifying_message: Please wait while we confirm your payment. This usually takes a few seconds.
payment_success.payment_failed_message: Your booking was not confirmed. You can return to checkout and try again.

payment_cancel.title: Payment Canceled
payment_cancel.description: Your payment did not complete, and no charge was made. You can retry securely now or return to your booking flow to review trip details first.
payment_cancel.retry_description: Return to payment and complete your booking securely.
payment_cancel.help_description: Our support team can help if your payment keeps failing.
